name: Telophobia: Fear of Endings
rules:
- Team Event
- Eleven rounds - 1 point per round. 
- Bonus point for a clean sheet

name: Zoophobia: Fear of Animals
rules:
- 3 Games with four players each. 
- First place in each game: 3 points. Second place in each game: 1 point.

name: Pteromerhanophobia: Fear of Flying
rules:
- Individual event. 
- Three throws each. Longest throw counts. 
- 1st place: 5 pts
- 2nd place: 3 pts
- 3rd place: 1 pt

name: Enigmaphobia: Fear of Trivia
rules:
- Team Event 
- A player selects a square
- Both teams confer and write down the answer
- Teams with correct answers get 10 points
- Incorrect answers get 0 points
- Teams alternate selecting questions
- For the BIG FINAL QUESTION, teams can wager any number of points
- 6 points to the winning team

name: Triskaidekaphobia: Fear of the Number 13
rules:
- 13 Quick Blowny Games
- Head-to-Head match play, no practice
- Players Randomly Selected
- 1 point per game

name: Necrophobia: Fear of Death
rules:
- Team relay race
- The team carries a team member through the course, then switches positions until all members have been carried
- 6 points to the winning team

name: Triskaidekaphobia: Fear of the Number 13
rules:
- 13 Quick Blowny Games
- Head-to-Head match play, no practice
- Players Randomly Selected
- 1 point per game

name: Skotophobia: Fear of Darkness
rules:
- Head-to-head matches
- Best of 3
- 1 point per game
